title: Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child learns in Year 3 at school, and ideas for helping them with their learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school
- Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum English in Year 3 Reading books at home in Year 3 Mathematics and Statistics in Year 3 Health and Physical Education in Year 3 Science in Year 3 Technology in Year 3 Social Sciences in Year 3 The Arts in Year 3

We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 3 #
Knowing what your child is learning will help you support and guide them as they begin learning reading, writing and maths every day.
- English in Year 3 For English in the third year at school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing. Find out more
For English in the third year at school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing.
- Reading books at home in Year 3 Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the third year of school. Find out more

### Reading books at home in Year 3
Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the third year of school.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 3 During the first 3 years at school, the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 3
During the first 3 years at school, the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 3 In Year 3, your child will learn about growing bodies, relationships, boundaries and movement. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 3
In Year 3, your child will learn about growing bodies, relationships, boundaries and movement.
- Science in Year 3 In Year 3, your child starts connecting everyday knowledge with scientific thinking, making careful observations, asking questions and investigating. Find out more
In Year 3, your child starts connecting everyday knowledge with scientific thinking, making careful observations, asking questions and investigating.
- Technology in Year 3 In Year 3, your child develops stronger design thinking, develops ideas and investigates their improvement and refinement, learning to break down tasks into logical steps. Find out more

### Technology in Year 3
In Year 3, your child develops stronger design thinking, develops ideas and investigates their improvement and refinement, learning to break down tasks into logical steps.
- Social Sciences in Year 3 In Year 3, your child will start to explore important concepts such as identity, family, and community, learning about societies, Oceania, and the concept of exchange. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 3
In Year 3, your child will start to explore important concepts such as identity, family, and community, learning about societies, Oceania, and the concept of exchange.
- The Arts in Year 3 In Year 3, your child will explore the Arts through simple concepts and techniques and engage with art forms from New Zealand and around the world. Find out more
In Year 3, your child will explore the Arts through simple concepts and techniques and engage with art forms from New Zealand and around the world.
